aboutSection.heading: Meet Patricia Wen
aboutSection.bio: Patricia Wen is a top-performing real estate agent with Keller Williams North Seattle, known for standout communication and negotiation. Her client-first approach keeps your goals at the center—from pricing and prep through closing.
aboutSection.credentials: Ranked in the top 1.5% of U.S. agents by REAL Trends in 2022 and 2023. Twelve years of experience, 90+ closed sales, and a wide range of price points across the Seattle metro. Buyer’s agent, listing agent, relocation, and new construction. Serves Bellevue, Seattle, Kirkland, the Eastside, and surrounding communities. Fluent in English, Mandarin, and Cantonese.

reviews.heading: Client reviews
reviews.subheading: Recent five-star feedback from Patricia’s clients (excerpts; full reviews on her public profile).
reviews.footnote: Reviewer names and transaction details match public Zillow reviews; quotes may be shortened slightly for layout.

items.quote: We had a wonderful experience working with Patricia. She was incredibly responsible, responsive, and truly knowledgeable about the market.
items.author: KeruiPeng

items.quote: Patricia is very responsive and knowledgeable. With her well-organized prep, we were able to get an offer one day after listing and close in less than a month.
items.author: chiaotichan

items.quote: Pat is an excellent real estate professional. She helped me buy in a challenging market and sell when things calmer—both great outcomes. She organized everything and provided outstanding guidance.
items.author: CY98034

items.quote: Patricia shows great ownership handling difficult negotiations as our seller’s agent—professional and able to identify what mattered most.
items.author: William Young

items.quote: I had an amazing experience working with Patricia Wen. She is an excellent communicator—always timely and efficient—and incredibly dedicated.
items.author: SarahZhang95

items.quote: We had a great experience. She was always responsive and reliable, gave honest opinions about each house, and pointed out drawbacks we should consider.
items.author: seren4h
